title: [Samba] Cannot access share using smbclient or cifs.mount
overview: [Samba] Cannot access share using smbclient or cifs.mount
description:
On Tentacle RC build, observing below issue -
ceph version 20.1.0-296-gf58de7fe (f58de7fe0e2e5af6b98dba395319042c2c8d5fe5) tentacle (rc - RelWithDebInfo
NAME                         HOST     PORTS            STATUS         REFRESHED   AGE  MEM USE  MEM LIM  VERSION  IMAGE ID      CONTAINER ID
,
],
},
],
---------       ----      -------
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.099 ms
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.063 ms
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=3 ttl=64 time=0.050 ms
^C
mount error(2): No such file or directory
On debugging, Engg has mentioned that it is an issue w.r.t. import of configuration to samba in sambacc
Opening this bug for further trakcing.
full_text:
On Tentacle RC build, observing below issue -
ceph version 20.1.0-296-gf58de7fe (f58de7fe0e2e5af6b98dba395319042c2c8d5fe5) tentacle (rc - RelWithDebInfo
NAME                         HOST     PORTS            STATUS         REFRESHED   AGE  MEM USE  MEM LIM  VERSION  IMAGE ID      CONTAINER ID
,
],
},
],
---------       ----      -------
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.099 ms
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.063 ms
64 bytes from 10.8.130.4: icmp_seq=3 ttl=64 time=0.050 ms
^C
mount error(2): No such file or directory
On debugging, Engg has mentioned that it is an issue w.r.t. import of configuration to samba in sambacc
Opening this bug for further trakcing.
